'''vovajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:spadicifloral|spadicifloral]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:spadicifloral|spadicifloral]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vovajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovajithi|vovajithi]] || [[word:vovajiji|vovajiji]] || [[word:vovajishi|vovajishi]] || [[word:vovajiki|vovajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovajuthuthu|vovajuthuthu]] || [[word:vovajujuju|vovajujuju]] || [[word:vovajushushu|vovajushushu]] || [[word:vovajukuku|vovajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovajuthu|vovajuthu]] || [[word:vovajuju|vovajuju]] || [[word:vovajushu|vovajushu]] || [[word:vovajuku|vovajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovajufthuf|vovajufthuf]] || [[word:vovajufjuf|vovajufjuf]] || [[word:vovajufshuf|vovajufshuf]] || [[word:vovajufkuf|vovajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovajethe|vovajethe]] || [[word:vovajeje|vovajeje]] || [[word:vovajeshe|vovajeshe]] || [[word:vovajeke|vovajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovajothotho|vovajothotho]] || [[word:vovajojojo|vovajojojo]] || [[word:vovajoshosho|vovajoshosho]] || [[word:vovajokoko|vovajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovajotho|vovajotho]] || [[word:vovajojo|vovajojo]] || [[word:vovajosho|vovajosho]] || [[word:vovajoko|vovajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovajofthof|vovajofthof]] || [[word:vovajofjof|vovajofjof]] || [[word:vovajofshof|vovajofshof]] || [[word:vovajofkof|vovajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfthÃŸf|vovajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfjÃŸf|vovajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfshÃŸf|vovajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfkÃŸf|vovajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vovajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vovajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vovajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vovajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfthÃŸf|vovajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfjÃŸf|vovajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfshÃŸf|vovajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfkÃŸf|vovajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfthÃŸf|vovajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfjÃŸf|vovajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfshÃŸf|vovajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vovajÃŸfkÃŸf|vovajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovajÃḊthÃḊ|vovajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vovajÃḊjÃḊ|vovajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vovajÃḊshÃḊ|vovajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vovajÃḊkÃḊ|vovajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovajathatha|vovajathatha]] || [[word:vovajajaja|vovajajaja]] || [[word:vovajashasha|vovajashasha]] || [[word:vovajakaka|vovajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovajatha|vovajatha]] || [[word:vovajaja|vovajaja]] || [[word:vovajasha|vovajasha]] || [[word:vovajaka|vovajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovajafthaf|vovajafthaf]] || [[word:vovajafjaf|vovajafjaf]] || [[word:vovajafshaf|vovajafshaf]] || [[word:vovajafkaf|vovajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vovajasha|vovajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovajshÃḋsha|vovajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovajrosha|vovajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovajmusha|vovajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovajyasha|vovajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovajnkshÃḋsha|govovajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovajnkrosha|govovajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovajnkmusha|govovajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovajnkyasha|govovajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vovavajasha|vovavajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovavajshÃḋsha|vovavajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovavajrosha|vovavajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovavajmusha|vovavajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovavajyasha|vovavajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovavajnkshÃḋsha|govovavajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovavajnkrosha|govovavajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovavajnkmusha|govovavajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovavajnkyasha|govovavajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vevÃḊjasha|vevÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vevÃḊjshÃḋsha|vevÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vevÃḊjrosha|vevÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vevÃḊjmusha|vevÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vevÃḊjyasha|vevÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govevÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|govevÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govevÃḊjnkrosha|govevÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govevÃḊjnkmusha|govevÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govevÃḊjnkyasha|govevÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vovfajasha|vovfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovfajshÃḋsha|vovfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovfajrosha|vovfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovfajmusha|vovfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovfajyasha|vovfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovfajnkshÃḋsha|govovfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovfajnkrosha|govovfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovfajnkmusha|govovfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovfajnkyasha|govovfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
